svg.text: Real-time Process & Thread Execution Across 3 ECUs

g.text: All processes run concurrently with priority scheduling
🖥️ ECU 1: RASPBERRY PI 4 (Quad-Core ARM Cortex-A72 @ 1.8GHz, 8GB RAM)
Multi-core processing: Each process can run on separate cores for parallel execution
💡 Parallel execution: Multiple processes run simultaneously on different cores
Context switching: OS scheduler manages CPU time allocation | Shared memory via ROS2 DDS
Cooperative multitasking: Tasks run sequentially in main loop with time-slicing
Non-blocking execution: Tasks check time elapsed, skip if not ready
Watchdog timer: Resets MCU if loop takes > 50ms (safety failsafe)
Priority inversion handled by task ordering in main loop
FreeRTOS multitasking: True parallel execution on 2 cores with priority scheduling
